## What are you trying to do?

Describe what you want to achieve.

## What have you tried?

Show any relevant code, config, or commands you've already attempted.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Laravel Vitals version | e.g. `v1.0.0-alpha.30` |
| PHP version | e.g. `8.3.4` |
| Laravel version | e.g. `12.x` |
